message:
feat(tui): add Analytics screen with InsightFeed card rendering (br-3vwi.7.4)

New TUI screen rendering InsightCard items from the KPI insight feed with
severity badges, confidence bars, rationale, and actionable next steps.
Also fixes pre-existing search.rs caller/callee argument mismatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
